issues.description: Learning objectives could be more specific about the types of informational texts students will work with
Materials needed section could benefit from organizing items by essential vs. optional
Suggested pacing could include more specific time allocations (e.g., 45-minute periods) for better planning

strengths: Excellent alignment with RI.6.1 standard covering both explicit evidence and inference skills
Comprehensive bundle structure with 12 well-sequenced components
Clear distinction between explicit and implicit information in standard breakdown
Strong differentiation strategies addressing struggling readers, advanced learners, and ELL students
Appropriate depth of knowledge levels (2-3) for grade 6 students
Balanced assessment approach combining formative and summative measures
Practical materials list with concrete tools for evidence marking and annotation
Learning objectives align well with standard requirements and are measurable
Professional formatting and organization suitable for educator use

detailed_feedback.structure: Well-organized with all required sections present and logically sequenced. Template compliance is excellent.
detailed_feedback.alignment: Strong alignment with RI.6.1 standard, clearly addressing both explicit evidence citation and inference making.
detailed_feedback.clarity: Instructions and content are clear and educator-friendly, though some sections could be slightly more specific.
detailed_feedback.difficulty: Appropriate for grade 6 with good scaffolding suggestions and progressive skill development.
detailed_feedback.inclusivity: Excellent differentiation strategies that address diverse learning needs including ELL support.
detailed_feedback.accuracy: Content is pedagogically sound with accurate representation of reading comprehension skills.
